cases.description: The Kubernetes API Server must have an audit log path set.
Kubernetes Kubelet must deny hostname override.
The Kubernetes manifests must be owned by root.

check.command: sh -c 'cfg=$(ps -ef | sed -n "s/.*--config[= ]\([^ ]*\).*/\1/p" | head -n 1); [ -z "$cfg" ] && exit 0; path="$cfg"; [ -d "$cfg" ] && path="$cfg/kubelet"; stat -c "%U:%G %n" "$path" 2>/dev/null | grep -v "^root:root "'

cases.description: The Kubernetes KubeletConfiguration file must be owned by root.

check.command: sh -c 'cfg=$(ps -ef | sed -n "s/.*--config[= ]\([^ ]*\).*/\1/p" | head -n 1); [ -z "$cfg" ] && exit 0; path="$cfg"; [ -d "$cfg" ] && path="$cfg/kubelet"; find "$path" -perm /133 -exec stat -c "%a %n" {} \; 2>/dev/null'

cases.description: The Kubernetes KubeletConfiguration files must have file permissions set to 644 or more restrictive.
The Kubernetes manifest files must have least privileges.
Kubernetes Controller Manager must disable profiling.

check.command: kubectl get pods --all-namespaces -o json | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); system={'kube-system','kube-node-lease','kube-public'}; bad=[]; [bad.append('%s %s %s' % (item.get('metadata',{}).get('namespace',''), item.get('metadata',{}).get('name',''), port.get('hostPort'))) for item in data.get('items',[]) if item.get('metadata',{}).get('namespace','') not in system for container in (item.get('spec',{}).get('containers',[]) + item.get('spec',{}).get('initContainers',[])) for port in container.get('ports',[]) if isinstance(port.get('hostPort'), int) and port.get('hostPort') < 1024]; print('\n'.join(bad), end='')"

cases.description: The Kubernetes cluster must use non-privileged host ports for user pods.
Secrets in Kubernetes must not be stored as environment variables.
The Kubernetes API server must use approved cipher suites.
Kubernetes API Server must have the SSL Certificate Authority set.

check.command: sh -c "if ps -ef | grep '[k]ubelet' | grep -q -- '--client-ca-file'; then exit 0; fi; cfg=\$(ps -ef | grep '[k]ubelet' | tr ' ' '\n' | sed -n 's/^--config=//p' | head -n1); test -n \"\$cfg\" && sed -n 's/^[[:space:]]*clientCAFile:[[:space:]]*//p' \"\$cfg\" | head -n1"

cases.description: Kubernetes Kubelet must have the SSL Certificate Authority set.
Kubernetes Controller Manager must have the SSL Certificate Authority set.
Kubernetes etcd must enable client authentication to secure service.

check.command: sh -c "if ps -ef | grep '[k]ubelet' | grep -q -- '--tls-private-key-file'; then exit 0; fi; cfg=\$(ps -ef | grep '[k]ubelet' | tr ' ' '\n' | sed -n 's/^--config=//p' | head -n1); test -n \"\$cfg\" && sed -n 's/^[[:space:]]*tlsPrivateKeyFile:[[:space:]]*//p' \"\$cfg\" | head -n1"

cases.description: Kubernetes Kubelet must enable tlsPrivateKeyFile for client authentication to secure service.

check.command: sh -c "if ps -ef | grep '[k]ubelet' | grep -q -- '--tls-cert-file'; then exit 0; fi; cfg=\$(ps -ef | grep '[k]ubelet' | tr ' ' '\n' | sed -n 's/^--config=//p' | head -n1); test -n \"\$cfg\" && sed -n 's/^[[:space:]]*tlsCertFile:[[:space:]]*//p' \"\$cfg\" | head -n1"

cases.description: Kubernetes Kubelet must enable tlsCertFile for client authentication to secure service.
Kubernetes etcd must enable client authentication to secure service.
Kubernetes etcd must have a key file for secure communication.
Kubernetes etcd must have a certificate for communication.
Kubernetes etcd must have the SSL Certificate Authority set.
Kubernetes etcd must have a certificate for communication.
Kubernetes etcd must have a key file for secure communication.
Kubernetes etcd must have peer-cert-file set for secure communication.
Kubernetes etcd must have a peer-key-file set for secure communication.

check.command: sh -c "if ps -ef | grep '[k]ubelet' | grep -q -- '--protect-kernel-defaults'; then exit 0; fi; cfg=\$(ps -ef | grep '[k]ubelet' | tr ' ' '\n' | sed -n 's/^--config=//p' | head -n1); test -n \"\$cfg\" && sed -n 's/^[[:space:]]*protectKernelDefaults:[[:space:]]*//p' \"\$cfg\" | head -n1"

cases.description: Kubernetes Kubelet must enable kernel protection.
The Kubernetes API server must have the ValidatingAdmissionWebhook enabled.
Kubernetes API Server must configure timeouts to limit attack surface.
The Kubernetes component manifests must be owned by root.
The Kubernetes component etcd must be owned by etcd.
The Kubernetes conf files must be owned by root.
The Kubernetes Kube Proxy kubeconfig must have file permissions set to 644 or more restrictive.
The Kubernetes Kube Proxy kubeconfig must be owned by root.

check.command: sh -c 'cfg=$(ps -ef | sed -n "s/.*--config[= ]\([^ ]*\).*/\1/p" | head -n 1); ca=$(grep -i "clientCAFile" "$cfg" 2>/dev/null | sed -n "s/.*clientCAFile:[ ]*\([^ ]*\).*/\1/p" | head -n 1); [ -z "$ca" ] || find "$ca" -perm /133 -exec stat -c "%a %n" {} \;'

cases.description: The Kubernetes Kubelet certificate authority file must have file permissions set to 644 or more restrictive.

check.command: sh -c 'cfg=$(ps -ef | sed -n "s/.*--config[= ]\([^ ]*\).*/\1/p" | head -n 1); ca=$(grep -i "clientCAFile" "$cfg" 2>/dev/null | sed -n "s/.*clientCAFile:[ ]*\([^ ]*\).*/\1/p" | head -n 1); [ -z "$ca" ] || stat -c "%U:%G %n" "$ca" 2>/dev/null | grep -v "^root:root "'

cases.description: The Kubernetes Kubelet certificate authority must be owned by root.
The Kubernetes component PKI must be owned by root.
The Kubernetes kubelet KubeConfig must have file permissions set to 644 or more restrictive.
The Kubernetes kubelet KubeConfig file must be owned by root.
The Kubernetes kubeadm.conf must be owned by root.
The Kubernetes kubeadm.conf must have file permissions set to 644 or more restrictive.
The Kubernetes kubelet config must have file permissions set to 644 or more restrictive.
The Kubernetes kubelet config must be owned by root.
The Kubernetes etcd must have file permissions set to 644 or more restrictive.
The Kubernetes admin kubeconfig must have file permissions set to 644 or more restrictive.
Kubernetes API Server audit logs must be enabled.
The Kubernetes API Server must be set to audit log max size.
The Kubernetes API Server must be set to audit log maximum backup.
The Kubernetes API Server audit log retention must be set.
The Kubernetes API Server audit log path must be set.
The Kubernetes PKI CRT must have file permissions set to 644 or more restrictive.
The Kubernetes PKI keys must have file permissions set to 600 or more restrictive.

check.command: sh -c "if ps -ef | grep '[k]ubelet' | grep -q -- '--streaming-connection-idle-timeout'; then exit 0; fi; cfg=\$(ps -ef | grep '[k]ubelet' | tr ' ' '\n' | sed -n 's/^--config=//p' | head -n1); test -n \"\$cfg\" || exit 0; v=\$(awk -F: '/^[[:space:]]*streamingConnectionIdleTimeout[[:space:]]*:/ {gsub(/[[:space:]\"'"']/,\"\",\$2); print \$2; exit}' \"\$cfg\"); case \"\$v\" in *h) n=\${v%h}; sec=\$((n*3600));; *m) n=\${v%m}; sec=\$((n*60));; *s) n=\${v%s}; sec=\$n;; *) sec=0;; esac; [ \"\$sec\" -ge 300 ] && printf Compliant"

cases.description: Kubernetes Kubelet must not disable timeouts.
Kubernetes API Server must disable basic authentication to protect information in transit.
Kubernetes API Server must disable token authentication to protect information in transit.
Kubernetes Secrets must be encrypted at rest.
